name: Liz Yehling's Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate peeled potatoes on the fine side of a grater or food processor.
2. Thoroughly mix the grated potatoes with the pork sausage.
3. Add eggs to the mixture and mix well.
4. If the mixture is watery, add flour as a thickener.
5. Mix in baking powder, salt, and pepper.
6. Fry portions of the batter in a lightly greased skillet until brown, turning only once.
7. Serve with applesauce. This recipe makes 20 or more 3"-4" thin pancakes. The pancakes are better when thin.
Submitted by Liz Yehling
Brevard, North Carolina
6 June 1982
